Event: Way of the Eagle
Event Date: 01/06/2019
Sage Bot Item Code: W17


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Wisdom of the Eagle Wand

Once in a while, casts a shield on an ally. The shield absorbs 5083-5344 (+Spell Power bonus) damage. When the shield expires or is destroyed, enemies will take damage equal to the shield's durability. The shield removes stuns, silences, and slows from the target.

Requirements: 98-100
